signer.name: compute_position_liquidation_check
signer.rust_types:
use std::collections::HashMap;

pub struct OracleEntry {
    state: HashMap<u64, u64>,
    counter: u64,
    name: Box<str>,
    epoch: u64,
    seq: u64,
    inner: Box<u64>,
    flag: u64,
    settings: HashMap<u64, u64>,
    history: Vec<u64>,
    last: u64,
    floor: u64,
    ceil: u64,
    cap: u64,
}

pub struct Position<'a> {
    users: HashMap<u64, u64>,
    history: Vec<u8>,
    epoch: u64,
    seq: u64,
    state: &'a u64,
    queue: Vec<u64>,
    oracle_entries: &'a [OracleEntry],
}

pub struct OptionUnitQty {
    tag: u64,
    val_lo: u64,
    val_hi: u64,
}

pub struct ClearingHouse<'a> {
    name: &'a str,
    universe_size: u64,
}
